data.title: Intel publishes Brief on Trust Stamp Partnership for AI-powered identity platform "Protect."
data.description: Trust Stamp has been featured in a Partnership Brief released by Intel Corporation, highlighting the company's "Protect" AI-driven identity platform. This partnership showcases Trust Stamp's innovative technology, which aims to revolutionize identity verification processes. The brief emphasizes the capabilities and benefits of Trust Stamp's platform, setting a new standard in identity verification. This collaboration signifies a significant milestone for Trust Stamp and demonstrates Intel Corporation's recognition of their cutting-edge solution.

data.title: Tampa General Hospital wins 2025 Healthcare Innovation Award for enhancing care quality and safety. TAMPA, Fla.
data.description: Tampa General Hospital (TGH) in Tampa, Florida received the 2025 Healthcare Innovation Award for implementing advanced strategies and technologies to improve the safety and quality of patient care. The academic health system was commended for its efforts to enhance healthcare standards.

data.title: Gold price surpasses $3,800/ounce post Federal Reserve rate cut, driving record central bank buying spree.
data.description: A recent news commentary released by USA News Group on behalf of GoldHaven Resources Corp revealed that gold has reached a historic high, surpassing $3,800 per ounce. This surge in value was triggered by the Federal Reserve's rate cut in September 2025. The significant increase in gold prices suggests a growing interest in the precious metal as a safe-haven investment option amidst economic uncertainties. The news commentary did not provide specific details beyond highlighting the rapid acceleration of gold prices post the Federal Reserve's decision.

data.title: Lafayette Christian Academy partners with Sustainability Partners for softball complex upgrades with sustainable turf, energy-efficient lighting.
data.description: LAFAYETTE, Louisiana - On September 24, 2025, a sports facility in Lafayette announced significant upgrades that will revolutionize the venue. The improvements will include sustainable turf and energy-efficient lighting throughout the stadium. This project is being spearheaded by Sustainability Partners, a Public Benefit Company renowned for their expertise in sustainable infrastructure initiatives. This modernization effort is poised to not only enhance the overall quality of the facility but also contribute to environmental sustainability. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting venture.

data.title: Miley Cyrus becomes global face of Maybelline, reimagines iconic jingle. Maybelline: number one makeup brand worldwide.
data.description: Bringing her unique voice, vision, and vibrant energy to a fresh chapter in the beauty industry, a cultural icon collaborates with Maybelline. In a significant announcement made in New York on September 24, 2025, Maybelline New York, the world's leading makeup brand, introduces the partnership. This collaboration marks a dynamic reimagining of Maybelline's most iconic essence.

data.title: Joe Jonas and Krispy Kreme team up for National Coffee Weekend offering $1 Original Glazed dozen with purchase of any dozen.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, a longstanding Krispy Kreme devotee, Joe Jonas, emphasized the perfect pairing of coffee and doughnuts for National Coffee Day. To celebrate, Krispy Kreme is running a special promotion from Saturday to Monday, September 29th, offering an Original Glazed dozen for only $1 with the purchase of any regular-priced dozen. On National Coffee Day itself, all visitors will...

data.title: Tom Lee's Ethereum bull thesis criticized for being "financially illiterate" as Ethereum is down 10% last month.
data.description: Ethereum (ETH) has experienced a 10% decline in the last month, prompting concerns about its short-term potential and challenging the optimistic targets set by Tom Lee. Andrew Kang, the founder of Mechanism Capital, criticized Lee's Ethereum predictions as financially unsound. Kang highlighted the lack of scaling in Ethereum fees compared to the increasing transaction volumes, which have led to a shift in network activity towards alternate chains like Solana (SOL) and Arbitrum (ARB). Kang argued against viewing ETH exclusively as a commodity, suggesting that historical commodity price behaviors may not favor its outlook. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Law firm investigating claims for Charter Communications investors with losses exceeding $100,000 between July 26, 2024 and July 24, 2025. Contact to discuss options.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses surpassing $100,000 in Charter to reach out to him directly. The losses should have occurred between July 26, 2024, and July 24, 2025. If you meet these criteria, Wilson can discuss potential options with you.

data.title: UK company OCEANIUM's OCEAN ACTIVES® H+ seaweed extract solves prebiotic problem, works at 95% lower dose, proven in study.
data.description: A recent clinical study conducted at the European Marine Science Park in OBAN, Scotland, on OCEANIUM's OCEAN ACTIVES® H+ product has demonstrated significant benefits for gut health. The study revealed that this product delivers these benefits with just 5% of the dosage required compared to traditional prebiotics. This breakthrough in gut health was revealed by the UK biotech company OCEANIUM on September 24, 2025. The results of the study highlight the potential for OCEAN ACTIVES® H+ to revolutionize gut health with its lower dosage requirements.

data.title: INJ price stays above $12 despite mixed signals, trades at $12.47 with key support at $11.88. Bearish vs bullish signals observed.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Injective (INJ) is currently priced at $12.47, experiencing bearish momentum indicators that are at odds with a bullish long-term trend. Traders are closely monitoring the key support level at $11.88.

data.title: Investor Rob Arnott praises AI chatbots but warns against AI stocks due to high valuations, recommends other segments.
data.description: Renowned investor Rob Arnott, founder of Research Affiliates, is impressed by the potential of AI chatbots after having one summarize his paper, yielding "brilliant" results. Despite this, he maintains caution regarding AI stocks, expressing skepticism about a possible market bubble. Arnott believes the future prospects of AI stocks are already reflected in their current valuations, potentially constraining future returns. Competition in the AI industry, especially from companies like Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) producing essential AI chips, raises concerns for Arnott. He highlighted the challenge of maintaining a 50% profit margin in the face of increasing competition.

data.title: Fermi America™ in Amarillo, Texas, launches IPO roadshow for $25 million offering.
data.description: Fermi LLC, set to become Fermi Inc. before the Form S-11 Registration Statement becomes effective, operating as Fermi America, has begun the roadshow for its upcoming initial public offering. The company plans to offer 25,000,000 shares.

data.title: Instant Car Fix is revolutionizing auto repair with 150% YoY growth, becoming a tech-driven platform. Disrupting $300B US market.
data.description: Located in Sterling, Virginia, Instant Car Fix has experienced a significant 150% increase in growth year-over-year. Functioning as a technology platform, the company offers car repair services at your convenience, no matter your location. Their disruptive approach is reshaping the $300 billion U.S. auto repair industry.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for Altimmune investors who suffered losses over $75,000 between August 10, 2023 and June 25, 2025.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Altimmune to reach out to him for a discussion regarding possible actions. If you have experienced losses exceeding $75,000 in Altimmune within the period from August 10, 2023, to June 25, 2025, Wilson invites you to contact him directly.
